title: euonymus dichotomus
intro: Euonymus dichotomus, also known as split-berried spindle, is a deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant's bark and berries have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Euonymus dichotomus include the potential relief from arthritis, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems. Euonymus dichotomus is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and can also be used topically to apply its medicinal properties to the skin.
